first_blood.name: 🥇 First Blood
first_blood.description: Be the first to solve any puzzle

speed_demon.name: ⚡ Speed Demon
speed_demon.description: Solve a puzzle within 1 hour of release

perfectionist.name: ✨ Perfectionist
perfectionist.description: Solve 10 puzzles without a single wrong submission

night_owl.name: 🦉 Night Owl
night_owl.description: Submit a solution between 2 AM and 5 AM

triple_threat.name: 🎯 Triple Threat
triple_threat.description: Solve one of each puzzle type in a week

comeback_kid.name: 🔄 Comeback Kid
comeback_kid.description: Solve a puzzle after 3 failed attempts
